If provided, the 'orderBy' also needs to be provided.","enum":["ASC","DESC"],"type":"string"},"labels":{"description":"Filter by labels","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"orderBy":{"description":"Order issues by field. If provided with repo, only issues for this repository are listed.","type":"string"},"page":{"description":"Page number for pagination (min 1)","minimum":1,"type":"number"},"perPage":{"description":"Results per page for pagination (min 1, max 100)","maximum":100,"minimum":1,"type":"number"},"query":{"description":"Search query using GitHub issues search syntax","type":"string"},"repo":{"description":"Optional repository name. If provided with owner, only issues for this repository are listed.","type":"string"},"sort":{"description":"Sort field by number of matches of categories, defaults to best match","enum":["comments","reactions","reactions-+1","reactions--1","reactions-smile","reactions-thinking_face","reactions-heart","reactions-tada","interactions","created","updated"],"type":"string"}},"required":["query"],"type":"object"},"name":"search_issues"}]}}}

2026-04-09T18:51:45.1954663Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-09T18:49:52.91729484Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"github","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"issue_number":"58018","method":"get","owner":"Azure","repo":"azure-sdk-for-net"},"name":"issue_read"}}}
2026-04-09T18:51:45.1995484Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-09T18:49:53.278179457Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58018,\"title\":\"[PostgreSQL] Docs: README examples are incomplete — missing Build() and query usage\",\"body\":\"## Documentation Gap\\n\\n**Package:** `Microsoft.Azure.PostgreSQL.Auth`\\n**Service directory:** `sdk/postgresql/Microsoft.Azure.PostgreSQL.Auth/`\\n**Triggered by:** commit [REDACTED] (PR #58012) by `@mattboentoro`\\n\\n## What Changed\\n\\nThe `Microsoft.Azure.PostgreSQL.Auth` 1.0.0-beta.1 release preparation commit was pushed, marking the first public beta of this library. It provides Entra ID (AAD) passwordless authentication for the Npgsql PostgreSQL driver via `UseEntraAuthentication` / `UseEntraAuthenticationAsync` extension methods on `NpgsqlDataSourceBuilder`.\\n\\n## Gaps Found\\n\\n- **Incomplete examples in README**: Both the \\u0026#34;Synchronous authentication\\u0026#34; and \\u0026#34;Asynchronous authentication\\u0026#34; sections end at `builder.UseEntraAuthentication(credential)` without calling `builder.Build()` — users are left without the step needed to actually create a usable `NpgsqlDataSource`\\n- **No end-to-end query example in README**: `samples/Sample01_HelloWorld.md` shows the full flow (`Build()` → `OpenConnectionAsync()` → `ExecuteScalarAsync()`), but the main README `Examples` section never demonstrates how to execute a query against the database\\n- **Explicit username pattern missing from README**: The `Key concepts` section explains username extraction but provides no code example for the explicit-username override pattern (passing `Username=my-db-role` in the connection string), which is a common advanced use case\\n- **Redundant \\u0026#34;Authenticate the client\\u0026#34; and \\u0026#34;Synchronous authentication\\u0026#34; snippets**: `Snippet:PostgreSqlAuth_ReadMe_Authenticate` and `Snippet:PostgreSqlAuth_ReadMe_Sync` (backed by `ReadMeSnippets.Authenticate()` and `ReadMeSnippets.SynchronousAuthentication()`) render identical code in the README, wasting space and confusing readers\\n\\n\\n\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Modify files\\n\\n**Edit `sdk/postgresql/Microsoft.Azure.PostgreSQL.Auth/README.md`**\\n\\n1. **Collapse the \\u0026#34;Authenticate the client\\u0026#34; snippet** — replace the inline code block with prose pointing readers to the Examples section (removing the duplicate `PostgreSqlAuth_ReadMe_Authenticate` placeholder), OR merge it with the sync example below.\\n\\n2. **Extend the \\u0026#34;Synchronous authentication\\u0026#34; example** to include `builder.Build()`:\\n\\n   Replace:\\n   ````\\n   ```\\n   with a snippet that also calls `builder.Build()` (update the region in the test file accordingly — see Step 2).\\n\\n3. **Extend the \\u0026#34;Asynchronous authentication\\u0026#34; example** similarly to include `builder.Build()`.\\n\\n4. **Add a \\u0026#34;Query the database\\u0026#34; subsection** under `## Examples` with a new snippet placeholder:\\n\\n   ```markdown\\n   ### Query the database\\n\\n   Once the data source is built, open a connection and execute queries as usual:\\n\\n   ```C# Snippet:PostgreSqlAuth_ReadMe_Query\\n   ```\\n   ```\\n\\n5. **Add an \\u0026#34;Explicit database role name\\u0026#34; subsection** under `## Examples`:\\n\\n   ```markdown\\n   ### Explicit database role name\\n\\n   If the PostgreSQL role name differs from the Entra ID identity name, include `Username` in the connection string. The library will skip token-based username extraction and use the provided value:\\n\\n   ```C# Snippet:PostgreSqlAuth_ReadMe_ExplicitUsername\\n   ```\\n   ```\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\n**File: `sdk/postgresql/Microsoft.Azure.PostgreSQL.Auth/tests/Samples/ReadMeSnippets.cs`**\\n\\n1. Update `SynchronousAuthentication()` to include `Build()` inside the region:\\n\\n   ```csharp\\n   [Test]\\n   public async Task SynchronousAuthentication()\\n   {\\n       #region Snippet:PostgreSqlAuth_ReadMe_Sync\\n\\n   #if SNIPPET\\n       var credential = new DefaultAzureCredential();\\n       var builder = new NpgsqlDataSourceBuilder(\\u0026#34;Host=\\u0026lt;\\u0026lt; YOUR SERVER \\u0026gt;\\u0026gt;.postgres.database.azure.com;Database=\\u0026lt;\\u0026lt; YOUR DATABASE \\u0026gt;\\u0026gt;;SSL Mode=Require\\u0026#34;);\\n   #else\\n       var credential = new TestTokenCredential(PostgreSqlTestEnvironment.CreateValidJwtToken(PostgreSqlTestEnvironment.EntraUser));\\n       var builder = new NpgsqlDataSourceBuilder(\\u0026#34;Host=localhost;Database=testdb\\u0026#34;);\\n   #endif\\n       builder.UseEntraAuthentication(credential);\\n       await using var dataSource = builder.Build();\\n\\n       #endregion\\n   }\\n   ```\\n\\n2. Update `AsynchronousAuthentication()` similarly:\\n\\n   ```csharp\\n   [Test]\\n   public async Task AsynchronousAuthentication()\\n   {\\n       #region Snippet:PostgreSqlAuth_ReadMe_Async\\n\\n   #if SNIPPET\\n       var credential = new DefaultAzureCredential();\\n       var builder = new NpgsqlDataSourceBuilder(\\u0026#34;Host=\\u0026lt;\\u0026lt; YOUR SERVER \\u0026gt;\\u0026gt;.postgres.database.azure.com;Database=\\u0026lt;\\u0026lt; YOUR DATABASE \\u0026gt;\\u0026gt;;SSL Mode=Require\\u0026#34;);\\n   #else\\n       var credential = new TestTokenCredential(PostgreSqlTestEnvironment.CreateValidJwtToken(PostgreSqlTestEnvironment.EntraUser));\\n       var builder = new NpgsqlDataSourceBuilder(\\u0026#34;Host=localhost;Database=testdb\\u0026#34;);\\n   #endif\\n       await builder.UseEntraAuthenticationAsync(credential);\\n       await using var dataSource = builder.Build();\\n\\n       #endregion\\n   }\\n   ```\\n\\n3. Add new `ReadMeQuery()` method for the query snippet (wrapped in `#if SNIPPET` because it requires a live database):\\n\\n   ```csharp\\n   [Test]\\n   [Category(\\u0026#34;Live\\u0026#34;)]\\n   public async Task ReadMeQuery()\\n   {\\n   #if SNIPPET\\n       var credential = new DefaultAzureCredential();\\n       var builder = new NpgsqlDataSourceBuilder(\\u0026#34;Host=\\u0026lt;\\u0026lt; YOUR SERVER \\u0026gt;\\u0026gt;.postgres.database.azure.com;Database=\\u0026lt;\\u0026lt; YOUR DATABASE \\u0026gt;\\u0026gt;;SSL Mode=Require\\u0026#34;);\\n       builder.UseEntraAuthentication(credential);\\n       await using var dataSource = builder.Build();\\n\\n       #region Snippet:PostgreSqlAuth_ReadMe_Query\\n       await using var connection = await dataSource.OpenConnectionAsync();\\n       await using var cmd = new NpgsqlCommand(\\u0026#34;SELECT version()\\u0026#34;, connection);\\n       var version = await cmd.ExecuteScalarAsync();\\n       #endregion\\n   #else\\n       await Task.CompletedTask;\\n   #endif\\n   }\\n   ```\\n\\n4. Add new `ReadMeExplicitUsername()` method:\\n\\n   ```csharp\\n   [Test]\\n   public void ReadMeExplicitUsername()\\n   {\\n       #region Snippet:PostgreSqlAuth_ReadMe_ExplicitUsername\\n\\n   #if SNIPPET\\n       var credential = new DefaultAzureCredential();\\n       var connectionString = \\u0026#34;Host=\\u0026lt;\\u0026lt; YOUR SERVER \\u0026gt;\\u0026gt;.postgres.database.azure.com;Database=\\u0026lt;\\u0026lt; YOUR DATABASE \\u0026gt;\\u0026gt;;Username=my-db-role;SSL Mode=Require\\u0026#34;;\\n   #else\\n       var credential = new TestTokenCredential(PostgreSqlTestEnvironment.CreateValidJwtToken(PostgreSqlTestEnvironment.EntraUser));\\n       var connectionString = \\u0026#34;Host=localhost;Database=testdb;Username=my-db-role\\u0026#34;;\\n   #endif\\n       var builder = new NpgsqlDataSourceBuilder(connectionString);\\n       builder.UseEntraAuthentication(credential);\\n\\n       #endregion\\n   }\\n   ```\\n\\nSnippet name mapping:\\n| Snippet name | Test method | README section |\\n|---|---|---|\\n| `PostgreSqlAuth_ReadMe_Sync` | `SynchronousAuthentication` | Examples → Synchronous authentication |\\n| `PostgreSqlAuth_ReadMe_Async` | `AsynchronousAuthentication` | Examples → Asynchronous authentication |\\n| `PostgreSqlAuth_ReadMe_Query` | `ReadMeQuery` | Examples → Query the database |\\n| `PostgreSqlAuth_ReadMe_ExplicitUsername` | `ReadMeExplicitUsername` | Examples → Explicit database role name |\\n\\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\\n\\nThe README at `sdk/postgresql/Microsoft.Azure.PostgreSQL.Auth/README.md` already contains all required sections (Getting started, Key concepts, Examples, Troubleshooting, Next steps, Contributing). No sections need to be added, only the Examples section content needs to be extended as described above.\\n\\n### Step 4: Validate\\n\\nRun these commands in order:\\n\\n1. `dotnet build sdk/postgresql/Microsoft.Azure.PostgreSQL.Auth/`\\n2. `dotnet test sdk/postgresql/Microsoft.Azure.PostgreSQL.Auth/ --filter TestCategory!=Live`\\n3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 postgresql` — verify the README is updated with the new snippet content by reviewing `git diff`\\n4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 postgresql` — no public API changes expected; run to confirm\\n5. `dotnet format sdk/postgresql/Microsoft.Azure.PostgreSQL.Auth/`\\n\\n\\n\\n## Next Steps\\n\\n\\u0026gt; [!TIP]\\n\\u0026gt; **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **`@copilot`** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above\\n\\n   ````\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n\\u0026gt; Generated by [Update Docs](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/actions/runs/24207149224/agentic_workflow) · ● 529.1K · [◷](https://github.com/search?q=repo%3AAzure%2Fazure-sdk-for-net+is%3Aissue+%22gh-aw-workflow-call-id%3A+Azure%2Fazure-sdk-for-net%2Fupdate-samples-and-docs%22\\u0026amp;type=issues)\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58018\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"github-actions[bot]\",\"id\":41898282,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/apps/github-actions\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/in/15368?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"NONE\",\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":0,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":0},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-09T18:46:44Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-09T18:46:44Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
